title: ATLAS
description: Modpack for Atlas, the best VS2 server. Features SPACE, custom raids, increased difficulty in all manners, tech, and much more (join to try!)
body:
DESIGNED FOR THE ATLAS SERVER. Can be played singleplayer however(but why would you want to do that)

Atlas lifted the stars above man, only for man to get there anyways. Fulfill the indomitable human spirit.

Features custom armed raids, increased difficulty,space mods for all the fun they bring, Create 6 and create addons for the technology component, and VS2 and its addons for custom vehicles, with more changes depending on what the community decides.

To join the server, use the discord below.
https://discord.gg/mup3zEJEmE

See our event modpacks:

https://modrinth.com/project/atlas-events

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/atlas-events

Credit goes to all rightful owners of the mods listed in the modpack, such as Barquito for Tacz Endless ammo.
